content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Mouthwash
description: An Effervescent Eridian relic that boosts assault rifle damage, with a much larger hidden payoff when paired with the Toothpick. On its own it is a straightforward offensive relic, but together with that weapon it becomes a major damage amplifier.
notes: At its highest roll, it can boost assault rifle damage by up to 47.5%.

special.description: Passively increases assault rifle damage. While Toothpick is equipped, it also grants a separate massive damage bonus. On Salvador, if Toothpick is held in the left hand, that bonus applies to the weapon in the right hand instead.
special.title: Gargle and spit.
